Steven Spielberg’s Disclosure Day Is Getting a 4K Steelbook – Here’s Where You Can Grab a Copy
description: Steven Spielberg’s Disclosure Day is now available to preorder as a 4K steelbook, on standard 4K, and Blu-ray. We've broken down which retailers have copies available now ahead of its release.

title: Resident Evil Requiem Has Dropped to Its Prime Day Price at Best Buy – Hurry To Grab It for $56
description: As part of Best Buy's 4th of July Sale, Resident Evil Requiem is on sale for $55.99 across PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X, and Nintendo Switch 2. That's $14 off its list price of $69.99.

title: Every New LEGO Set Now Available in July 2026
description: LEGO only has five new sets out in July 2026, but each one is worth checking out.

title: Iron Soul: Dungeon Codes for July 2026
description: Get the latest codes for Iron Soul: Dungeon and redeem free rewards including race rerolls.

title: Microsoft Is Reminding Xbox Game Pass Members That They'll Have to Buy Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 if They Want to Play Day One
description: Microsoft is sending notifications out to Xbox Game Pass members reminding them that Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 won’t be in the subscription service this year, so if they want to play the game at launch, they’ll have to buy it.
